jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ajio - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ajio. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Ajio:
Ajio is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio!
